CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DIANA BROWN AS COUNSEL. DEF. MYRNA SAGARIO PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEFS. LEOVIGIL SAGARIO & MAXAMINA SAGARIO NOT PRESENT, BUT MS. MYRNA SAGARIO STATES SHE IS AUTHORIZED TO REACH A SETTLEMENT FOR ALL DEFENDANTS. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1001 SUNNYDALE, #3108, S.F, CA. - WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT STAYED TO 10-30-93 5PM - $1,356 RENT & DAMAGES - $82.50 COSTS - $780 ATTY. FEES DEF. AGREES TO PROVIDE PL. W/INFORMATION BY 10-8-93 FOR A HUD INTERIM CERIFICATE & THEN THE RENT WILL BE ADJUSTED ACCORDING TO HUD PROCEDURES - PL. WILL PROVIDE TO DEF. BY 10-15-93 STATEMENT AS TO ADJUSTED RENT - DEF. TO PAY ADJUST- ED RENT BY 10-29-93 & WILL MAKE PMTS ON $862 COSTS & ATTY FEES OF $127 MO STARTING 11-15-93 - DEF. TO PAY RENT BY 5TH OF EACH MONTH & AS LONG AS RENT IS CURRENT EXECUTION ON WRIT WILL BE STAYED & IN APRIL 1994 SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WILL BE FILED.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT DECL. OF DIANA BECTON BROWN FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECRETARY,  UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAGARIO, LEOVIGIL SAGARIO, MAXIMINA SAGARIO, MYRNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1001 SUNNYDALE AVE, #310-A, S.F, CA. 94134 $1,356.78 RENT, $780.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,219.28, STAYED UNTIL OCT-30-1993, SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
